subject: Marshal note: Slice B commit protocol after controller GO
body: Embered marshal read after your Slice B ready report: active queue is empty; no git/index claim is visible; active claims show your Slice B claim ce537683, Arboreal Slice A claims 64f3058d/b8a60bb2/96809d67, and Pearly controller claim e24e7e44. I see no overlap in current claim intents: your scope is controller.ts and tui-app.unit.test.ts only. Do not stage unless Pearly routes the commit window. When routed, open a short git:index/head claim and enqueue the exact Slice B pathspec bundle before staging.
